title: The Problem of Plastic Pollution
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line. There is an example at the beginning (0).

content.text: Plastic waste has become one of the most (0) significant environmental challenges of our time. The (17) pollution of oceans and rivers by plastic has reached alarming levels in recent decades. Global (18) production of single-use plastics continues to rise despite international warnings. The chemicals released by plastic waste are deeply (19) harmful to marine life and can enter the food chain. The current model of consuming and discarding plastic is clearly (20) unsustainable and must change urgently. Scientists and governments are working together to find a lasting (21) solution to the crisis. Much of the problem stems from (22) irresponsible disposal of waste by both individuals and businesses. Greater public (23) awareness of the issue is essential, as many people do not realise how serious the situation has become. Better (24) management of plastic waste through improved recycling systems is now considered a global priority.

example.text: Plastic waste has become one of the most (0) SIGNIFICANT environmental challenges of our time. (SIGNIFY)

questions.explanation: A noun is needed after 'The'; 'pollute' becomes 'pollution' by adding the suffix '-ion'.
A noun is needed before 'of single-use plastics'; 'produce' becomes 'production' by adding the suffix '-ion'.
An adjective is needed after 'deeply'; 'harm' becomes 'harmful' by adding the suffix '-ful'.
A negative adjective is needed; 'sustain' → 'sustainable', then the prefix 'un-' creates 'unsustainable', meaning 'cannot be maintained long-term'.
A noun is needed after 'a lasting'; 'solve' becomes 'solution' by replacing '-ve' with '-tion'.
A negative adjective is needed; the prefix 'ir-' is added to 'responsible' to mean 'not acting carefully'.
A noun is needed after 'Greater public'; 'aware' becomes 'awareness' by adding the suffix '-ness'.
A noun is needed after 'Better'; 'manage' becomes 'management' by adding the suffix '-ment'.
